# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_NOTIFY_ON_MERGE_REQUEST: "true"
  DEPLOYMENT_TAG_PREFIX: "v"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the application..."
    - echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Merge request title: $MR_TITLE"
    - DEPLOYMENT_TAG="${DEPLOYMENT_TAG_PREFIX}${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"
    - echo "Creating deployment tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: manual
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-app-url.com
